title: Affordable healthcare for all
summary: Expand the social health insurance scheme to cover every household, prioritizing maternal and chronic care.
evidence: 3.2M households enrolled as of Q2 2027: https://example.gov.ke/sha-report

title: Fix Nairobi's road drainage
summary: Rehabilitate flood-prone arterial roads and clear blocked drainage before the next rainy season.

title: Devolution oversight
summary: Publish a quarterly scorecard tracking every shilling allocated to Nairobi County projects.
